Title: Create order successfully
Expected Result: 201 returned with correct order body; order persisted

Title: No partial write on dependency timeout
Expected Result: 502 returned or dependency error raised; database remains unchanged

Title: Reserve inventory through gRPC successfully
Expected Result: Reservation succeeds and stock count decreases

Title: Map gRPC timeout to dependency error
Preconditions: gRPC inventory service configured for timeout
Expected Result: Dependency error raised; no order persisted

Title: Create order through browser UI
Expected Result: Confirmation message shown and order created

Title: Show UI error on out-of-stock response
Steps: Submit UI form with out-of-stock SKU
Expected Result: Error message shown in result section

Title: Verify consumer contract for create and get order
Preconditions: Provider app and Pact tooling available
Steps: Run consumer and provider Pact tests
Expected Result: Contract file generated and provider verification passes
